entities.name: Lisa Noble
entities.context: Speaker discussing generational attitudes toward failure and certainty

entities.name: Failure tolerance
entities.context: Generational trait - lack of exposure to significant failure

entities.name: Certainty preference
entities.context: Generational preference for predictable, guaranteed outcomes over ambiguity

entities.name: Outcome guarantee
entities.context: Willingness to endure difficulty in exchange for guaranteed results

relationships.context: Observes this generation is not accustomed to significant failure
States this generation prioritizes certainty above almost everything else
Desire for certainty drives need for guaranteed outcomes
